docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA PROOF OF SERVICE ON DCA SUBPOENA UNIT FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUHL, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMPUSA INC. $713.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $745.00, PLAINTIFF HAS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT THE COMPUTER HE PURCHASED AROUND SEPT 2002 & PLAINTIFF HAS NO FURTHER RIGHTS IN THAT COMPUTER. THE WARRANTY THAT PLAINTIFF PURCHASE WITH THE COMPUTER AROUND APRIL 2001 REMAINS VALID FOR ITS 3 YEAR TERM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
